title: Indulgent Slovakian Shallots Fried
description: A crispy and salty Slovakian dish featuring shallots, perfect for a gluten-free friendly meal. Blanch the shallots in boiling water to bring out their natural sweetness before frying to a golden crisp.

ingredients.name: 4 large shallots
ingredients.notes: preferably sweet and mild variety like Eschalot

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon salt
ingredients.notes: use flaky sea salt for added crunch

ingredients.name: 1 cup gluten-free breadcrumbs
ingredients.notes: preferably whole grain for added nutrition

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.notes: use high-quality extra virgin for best flavor

ingredients.name: 1 egg
ingredients.notes: for egg wash if using breadcrumb coating

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until it reaches 375°F (190°C).
Add the gluten-free breadcrumbs to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, until lightly toasted and fragrant, about 3 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix together the gluten-free flour, salt, and black pepper.
Add the shallots to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the flour mixture, shaking off any excess.
Dip each floured shallot into the beaten egg and then coat in the gluten-free breadcrumbs, pressing the crumbs gently onto the shallot to adhere, if using.
Carefully add the breaded shallots to the hot skillet, in batches if necessary, and fry until golden brown and crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried shallots from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Repeat the frying process with the remaining shallots, adjusting the heat as needed to prevent burning.
Serve the fried shallots immediately, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or chives if desired, and enjoy!
Serve as a snack or side dish, or use as a topping for salads or soups.
If desired, drizzle with additional olive oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
